title: Online Education Marketing Specialist
description: Pickering Global Campus is the online learning platform, part of the SagePaths Group. We deliver accessible, high-quality academic and professional programmes designed for learners across Asia and beyond. As we continue expanding our digital education offerings, we are building a dedicated team to drive online growth, brand visibility, and student acquisition. This role is ideal for an individual who thrives in a start-up-style environment—resourceful, hands-on, adaptable—yet appreciates the structure and support of a well-established organisation. If you want to play a pivotal role in shaping a new digital learning initiative, this is your opportunity. Role Brief We are seeking a dynamic and ambitious Online Education Marketing Specialist to lead Pickering Global Campus’ digital presence, growth initiatives, and student recruitment strategy. You will design and execute marketing campaigns from scratch, experiment with new tactics, analyse performance, and directly influence PGC’s overall marketing roadmap. This role requires creativity, data-driven thinking, and ownership of the full digital funnel. Key Responsibilities Digital Strategy & Campaign Execution Develop and execute digital marketing strategies to grow brand awareness, leads, and online enrolments. Create multi-channel content and campaigns (email, social media, paid ads, landing pages) tailored to target audiences. Maximise use of CRM and automation tools (e.g., HubSpot/Brevo) for email marketing and behavioural journeys. Growth & Performance Marketing Run growth experiments such as A/B testing, landing page optimisation, and lead magnets to achieve rapid, measurable results. Monitor and analyse campaign performance using Google Analytics, HubSpot, and internal dashboards. Adapt strategies based on data insights to continually improve ROI and conversion rates. Content, Brand & Web Manage website content and ensure alignment with PGC’s brand direction. Collaborate with internal teams and freelancers (design, content, sales) to ensure cohesive and impactful messaging. Guide social media content planning alongside Brands & Communications for consistent digital presence. Market Research & Strategy Development Conduct market and competitor research to identify new opportunities and emerging trends. Contribute to shaping PGC’s marketing roadmap and prioritise high-impact initiatives. Support the development of new programmes by providing audience insights and demand analysis. Agile Collaboration Work closely with Product, Tech, and Sales teams to ensure marketing initiatives support the learner journey and platform features. Adjust campaigns quickly in response to performance data and operational needs. Take initiative and operate independently in a fast-paced, start-up-like environment. Requirements Minimum Bachelor degree with 2+ years of experience in digital marketing, growth marketing, or performance marketing. Strong understanding of digital fundamentals: SEO, PPC, social media, content marketing, email marketing, and funnel optimisation. Comfortable with analytics tools (Google Analytics, HubSpot, Meta Ads Manager, etc.). Creative problem-solver with a willingness to test new ideas and iterate rapidly. Excellent written and verbal communication skills; attention to detail is essential. Ability to work independently and thrive in a dynamic, entrepreneurial environment. Advantageous: Experience building/launching new online products, start-up experience, EdTech or education industry exposure.

title: Software & AI Manager
description: Job Summary We seek an experienced and forward-thinking Software & AI Manager to lead the design, development, and deployment of high-impact software and AI-driven solutions. This role requires a blend of hands-on technical leadership, strategic architecture oversight, and people management, driving excellence across the full software lifecycle while embedding AI/ML capabilities into core products and platforms. Key Responsibilities Software Engineering Leadership Establish and maintain robust processes and documentation across the Software Product Lifecycle , from inception to retirement. Oversee the end-to-end application lifecycle —including requirements analysis, system design, development, testing, deployment, release, and post-launch support. Take ownership of critical technical components: UI/UX design , business logic, data access layers, external API integrations, and database schema design . Evaluate and recommend tools, frameworks, and methodologies to ensure product quality, scalability, and maintainability. Deliver production-ready software by writing clean, efficient, and well-documented code. Mentor and coach engineering teams in: Writing comprehensive unit and UI tests, troubleshooting, debugging, and performance optimisation, designing intuitive user interfaces and developing real-time and batch data processing systems Collaborate with Sales, Product, and Project teams to scope, prioritise, and deliver new features. Ensure both new and legacy systems adhere to quality, security, and compliance standards . Proactively research and propose new software products, tools, and architectural improvements. Maintain thorough technical documentation for sustainability and knowledge transfer. Keep abreast of emerging technologies and industry best practices. Recruit top talent and design individualised training and career development plans . AI/ML Strategy & Execution Design, develop, and optimise AI models, leveraging both open-source and proprietary resources . Build scalable AI solutions using cloud platforms (AWS/Azure/GCP), data pipelines, and modern databases. Implement and deploy NLP, LLMs, and other AI frameworks for real-world use cases. Architect and deliver RESTful APIs to expose AI capabilities to internal/external systems. Apply Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to improve relevance, accuracy, and trustworthiness of AI outputs. Practise advanced prompt engineering, including instruction tuning, templating, and fine-tuning strategies. Embed AI development within CI/CD pipelines , enforcing test-driven development and reproducible workflows. Conduct rigorous evaluation of models using appropriate metrics, benchmarks, and validation protocols . Continuously monitor advancements in AI/ML research and translate them into business value. Partner with stakeholders to convert business challenges into AI-powered solutions . Ensure seamless integration of AI components with existing software ecosystems. Requirements Experience & Technical Background Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science , Engineering, or a related field (Master’s preferred). 10+ years of hands-on software development and leadership experience. Proven track record as a Team Lead or Tech Lead , managing end-to-end software projects. Strong domain experience in cybersecurity (especially European standards) , IP telephony , and data networking, ideally in a project or technical management capacity. Demonstrated portfolio of released mobile/web applications (App Store, Play Store, or enterprise deployments). Proficiency in multiple programming languages: Essential : SQL, Python, Strongly preferred : Node.js, TypeScript, C#, Java Mobile : Swift, Objective-C, Java (Android), plus hybrid frameworks (e.g., React Native, Flutter) Expertise in: SDLC & Agile methodologies, data modelling, and relational (RDBMS) & NoSQL database design, REST/SOAP API integration, Cloud-based AI/ML deployment (AWS/Azure/GCP) (a plus), ML frameworks (TensorFlow, PyTorch) (a plus) AI/ML Competencies Solid foundation in machine learning (supervised/unsupervised learning, neural networks, optimisation, evaluation metrics). Experience with data preprocessing, feature engineering, and SQL for AI pipelines . Deep understanding of algorithms, data structures, and their role in scalable ML systems. Familiarity with MLOps practices , including CI/CD for AI, model versioning, and monitoring. Soft Skills & Attributes Exceptional verbal and written communication, able to explain technical concepts to non-technical audiences. Strong organisational, multitasking, and prioritisation skills . Self-motivated, independent, and able to thrive with minimal supervision. Collaborative team player who can inspire, mentor, and align engineers toward shared goals. Adaptable under pressure, with a bias for action in fast-paced environments. Committed to lifelong learning and technology innovation. Willingness to travel as required.

A minimum of 7 years of experience as a ServiceNow Solution Architect, with a strong focus on implementations within the financial sector. Proven experience with ServiceNow modules such as ITSM, ITOM, ITBM, Security Incident Response, Customer Service Management, Asset Management, Project Portfolio Management, Performance Analytics, GRC, and HR Service Delivery. title: Finance / Accounting Trainer (Freelance/Part Time)
description: Position Overview: WLP Academy is looking for a skilled and experienced Accounting/Finance Trainer to join our team. The Trainer will play a key role in providing top-notch training, ensuring adult learners achieve effective learning outcomes and assessments. This role demands a strong commitment to upholding assessment integrity while contributing to a positive and engaging learning environment. The ideal candidate will be passionate about teaching and dedicated to promoting a culture of excellence. Training Delivery: •	Participate in curriculum improvements and deliver course content in alignment with WLP’s curriculum and learning standards. •	Facilitate manual and digital assessments to evaluate and track learner performance and progress. •	Delivery of Core Accounting Concepts: Double Entry, Accounting Standards & Accounting Cycle •	Financial Statement Analysis: Guide learners on how to read and interpret the Profit & Loss (Statement of Comprehensive Income) and Balance Sheet (Statement of Financial Position). •	Interpretation of financials: Teach calculation of key financial ratios (Current Ratio, ROI, Gross Margin) to assess business health. •	Data Analytics & Visualization: Guide learners on extracting raw financial data and transforming it into actionable insights. •	Ensure learners meet the specified course learning objectives through engaging and effective teaching methods. •	Conduct engaging, practical training sessions (in-person, virtual, or hybrid). •	Adapt delivery style to suit different audience types (e.g., professionals, entrepreneurs, junior staff). •	Encourage participant interaction, learning, and real-world application. •	Provide practical exercises and simulations in financial statements analysis Assessment Integrity: •	Uphold the highest standards of assessment integrity, ensuring that assessments follow WSQ guidelines and internal policies. •	Ensure that all assessment questions are marked, and learners' answers are accurately evaluated. •	Verify that all questions are answered and attempted by learners. Incomplete responses should not be marked as “pass.” •	Conduct and properly document oral recovery sessions, ensuring transparency and consistency. •	Prevent instances of “flashing” answers and address any behaviors that compromise assessment integrity. •	Ensure incorrect answers are not marked as "pass"; only correct answers aligned with the assessment criteria should be considered. Administrative Responsibilities: •	Complete and submit Assessment Summary Records (ASRs) and other required documentation in a timely manner. •	Maintain accurate records of attendance, assessments, and learner-related data. •	Ensure that all training materials remain up-to-date and relevant in accordance with industry standards. Learner Support and Engagement: •	Provide constructive feedback on assessments and offer guidance for learners to improve. •	Address learner concerns professionally, promoting a supportive and positive learning environment. •	Foster inclusivity and respect in the classroom, ensuring equal learning opportunities for all students. Requirements •	ACLP (Advanced Certificate in Learning and Performance) or ACTA (Advanced Certificate in Training and Assessment) certification is required. •	Degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field. •	Professional certification (e.g., CA, ACCA, CPA) is a plus. •	At least 3–5 years of practical accounting experience. •	Strong presentation, facilitation, and interpersonal skills. •	Prior training or teaching experience is highly desirable. •	Ability to simplify complex financial concepts for diverse learners.

title: Senior Principal Data Scientist
description: Get to Know the Team The Fulfilment Tech Family is an integral part of Grab, connecting our wide-ranging marketplaces across Southeast Asia. We develop real-time distributed systems and machine learning solutions to process hundreds of millions of requests daily, ensuring efficient allocation of supply, pricing, and seamless order matching. Our mission: Build reliable and impactful products for driver-partners. Optimize the ability to fulfil consumer needs in any conditions. Develop sustainable marketplaces, balancing user experience and operational costs across stakeholders. We're hiring a Senior Principal Data Scientist to join the Fulfilment team. You're an individual contributor whom will lead strategic optimization initiatives that elevate pricing, dispatch, and supply management strategies. You'll combine in-depth data-driven methodologies with a strategic mindset to drive automation and marketplace efficiency. Get to Know the Role As a Senior Principal Data Scientist, you'll shape and advance cross-system Fulfilment strategies, accounting for how passengers and driver-partners respond to platform interventions. You'll leverage machine learning and operations research methodologies to optimize marketplace-level operational outcomes. Through joint optimization across systems—pricing, dispatch, and supply positioning—you'll design interpretable, adaptable, and multi-objective-aware Reinforcement Learning decision agents. You'll model marketplace behaviour and develop policies to automate key aspects of platform operations, contributing lasting impact for customers, driver-partners, and Grab. You'll report to the Head of Data Science and work onsite at Grab's One North Singapore office. The Critical Tasks You Will Perform You will: Develop ML and DL models to improve generalisation and operational efficiency Create unified Reinforcement Learning architectures that coordinate multiple elements, including pricing, dispatch, and supply positioning, while balancing diverse marketplace objectives. Design frameworks for joint optimization of marketplace systems through hierarchical or multi-agent RL approaches that push the operational Pareto frontier. Explore representations of data that consider supply-demand signals, behaviour elasticity, and factors like weather, traffic, and user intent. Build interpretable models to capture passenger and driver decision-making across diverse scenarios and operational conditions. title: Automation Engineer - Testing & Commissioning
description: About Navsar Global: Navsar Global is a leading specialist firm dedicated to connecting top-tier talent with pioneering opportunities across critical infrastructure sectors such as power generation, data centres, and oil & gas. We partner with industry leaders to build the teams that power the future, ensuring precision, reliability, and innovation in every placement. We are looking for Automation Engineer (Testing & Commissioning) to join us in shaping the next generation of industrial excellence in Urban Mobility (LTA/MRT) Role: Automation Engineer - Testing & Commissioning Contract Duration: This is a 12-month contract position, with potential for extension based on project requirements and performance. Location: Singapore (Client Project Sites) Role Overview: As an Automation Engineer specializing in Testing & Commissioning, you will play a pivotal role in ensuring the seamless integration and operational readiness of critical electrification projects. You will take ownership of ETTS/TSSS testing activities, coordinating daily workflow at site while upholding the highest standards of quality, safety (EHS), and project schedule. This role involves managing complex railway power supply projects from communication and control architecture design through to system commissioning. Key Responsibilities: Lead and coordinate daily testing and commissioning activities on-site for electrification projects, ensuring adherence to project timelines and specifications. Take full ownership of ETTS (Emergency Traction Tripping System) and TSSS (Traction Substation SCADA System) testing activities. Manage railway power supply projects, encompassing communication systems, control architecture design, prototyping, integration testing, and comprehensive system commissioning. Collaborate effectively with internal departments, clients, system-wide contractors, and subcontractors to arrange and execute site activities. Actively participate in weekly Works Train Notice Meetings to secure track access and ensure testing is executed on schedule and in compliance with testing standards. Attend Operator / LTA Track work Access meetings and LTA manpower planning meetings (e.g., for C853e), and submit necessary SDAR and TAR documents to gain track access for CCL/NEL works. Support the Project Manager in the preparation of essential project documentation, including Method Statements, Risk Assessments, step-by-step work plans, and other required paperwork. Develop and maintain systems and platforms for weekly project progress monitoring, providing timely feedback to the project planner. Supervise and support installation teams in carrying out Addition & Alteration (A&A) activities on-site, fostering a self-motivated and efficient work environment. Assist the Project Manager in preparing and managing work schedules and programs. Undertake ad-hoc duties as assigned by the Manager, contributing to the overall success of the project. Demonstrate a strong commitment to teamwork, ensuring smooth project completion through collaborative efforts. Be willing to work extended hours, including night shifts (engineering hours) and public holidays, as project demands necessitate. Exercise strong decision-making capabilities to resolve on-site challenges efficiently. Provide support to other project teams as required, fostering a cohesive project environment. Apply expertise in Station RTU, PLCs, and cybersecurity principles relevant to industrial and electrification projects. Coordinate closely with project, interfacing, and T&C teams, as well as external interface partners. Maintain strong professional relationships with clients and vendors. Qualifications & Experience: Bachelor's Degree in Electronics/Electrical Engineering or a related field (e.g., Diploma/Bachelor in Electrical & Electronic or Mechanical field). Minimum of 5 years of progressive experience in automation, PLC, and SCADA systems, with a strong preference for experience in electrification or railway projects. At least 3 years of direct working experience in ETTS/TSS Electrification projects is essential. Demonstrated experience in MRT electrification projects is highly advantageous. Proficiency in Siemens PLC, SCADA, and HMI technology, including practical experience with software such as S7-300/400, ET200SP, SIMATIC STEP7, TIA Portal, and S7-1500. Experience or knowledge of Siemens Protection Relay systems (e.g., SIPROTEC, Sitras MDC, PLC). Familiarity with Emergency Traction Tripping System (ETTS) SIL system. Experience with third-party PLC, SCADA, and software platforms is beneficial. Proven skills in testing and commissioning PLC systems, including interfacing with AC/DC switchgear and traction power station equipment. Strong competency in PLC software development. Preferred knowledge and experience in network technologies such as Ethernet, TCP/IP, MODBUS RTU, PROFIBUS, and PROFINET. Added advantage if you possess expertise in cybersecurity, system architectures, and industrial security. Skills & Attributes: Independent, self-motivated individual with strong initiative and analytical problem-solving skills. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, capable of effective interaction with diverse stakeholders (colleagues, clients, vendors). Ability to take full responsibility and ownership of assigned tasks and project outcomes. Strong understanding of functional safety principles, particularly IEC 61508. Advanced knowledge of compliance with internal and external laws and regulations, ensuring ethically sound business practices. Basic understanding of contract formats, practices, and policies. Awareness of information security best practices and labor laws relevant to daily work. Proficiency in Global Business English, both written and verbal, for clear international communication. A team player willing to collaborate and support colleagues for project success. Why Join Navsar Global? At Navsar Global, we believe in empowering talent to drive innovation. We offer unparalleled opportunities to work on critical, high-impact projects with leading industry players. As part of our network, you'll gain exposure to cutting-edge technologies and contribute to infrastructure that shapes the future. We are committed to your professional growth and success, providing a platform where your expertise is valued and your career can flourish.

Uses available procurement systems and tools. Ensures compliance with procurement regulations and contract specifications. Supplier Relationship Management: Knowledge of supplier relationship management concept and strategies; ability to address critical issues to meet supplier needs and maintain engaged, partnering relationship with suppliers . Explains the benefits of establishing and maintaining supplier relationships. Identifies the main objectives and functions of supplier relationship management. Strategic Sourcing: Knowledge of strategic sourcing methods, technologies and processes; ability to analyze, improve and re-evaluate organizational procurement process continuously. Explains key concepts and steps of strategic sourcing. Identifies major initiatives, key issues and benefits of strategic sourcing. Caterpillar is not currently hiring individuals for this position who now or in the future require sponsorship for employment visa status; however, as a global company, Caterpillar offers many job opportunities outside of Singapore which can be found through our employment website at www.caterpillar.com/careers . Final Details: Please frequently check the email associated with your application, including the junk/spam folder, as this is the primary correspondence method. If you wish to know the status of your application – please use the candidate log-in on our career website as it will reflect any updates to your status. If you are interested in joining our team, please apply using an English version of your CV. We look forward to meeting you! About Caterpillar Caterpillar Inc. is the world’s leading manufacturer of construction and mining equipment, off-highway diesel and natural gas engines, industrial gas turbines and diesel-electric locomotives. For nearly 100 years, we’ve been helping customers build a better, more sustainable world and are committed and contributing to a reduced-carbon future. title: Generative AI Engineer
description: Summary We are seeking a highly skilled and passionate AI Engineer with expertise in Generative AI (GenAI) to develop and implement cutting-edge AI solutions across cloud-native environments. This role combines hands-on technical engineering with strategic leadership, enabling customers to translate AI innovation into scalable products—from ideation to MVP and beyond. Responsibilities Design, build, and deploy GenAI-driven applications using frameworks such as LangChain, OpenAI API, and Hugging Face Transformers. Architect and implement scalable solutions within containerized, microservices-based cloud-native environments (e.g., Kubernetes, OpenShift). Integrate GenAI models and services seamlessly into existing platforms and services. Collaborate with partner teams (Google, Microsoft, AWS, IBM, etc.) on advanced AI solution development. Refactor and modernize legacy systems with 12-factor principles and cloud-native best practices. Drive innovation in GenAI adoption through internal R&D, PoCs, and pilot programs. Stay ahead of AI trends and apply the latest research into practical applications. Provide expert consultation on GenAI architecture, deployment strategies, and business use case alignment. Facilitate technical workshops, presentations, and strategic planning sessions with clients. Serve as a trusted technical advisor on AI/ML integration, helping clients unlock value from AI technologies. Requirements Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field 5 years of software engineering experience, with strong programming skills in Java and Python Deep expertise in Generative AI frameworks, including LangChain, OpenAI, Hugging Face Transformers. Strong foundation in Natural Language Processing (NLP): tokenization, embeddings, transformers, LLMs. Experience with prompt engineering and optimizing AI model interactions. Proven success designing and deploying cloud-native solutions using Kubernetes, Docker, and microservices. Strong experience with Agile and DevOps practices, working in Jira-based environments. Hands-on experience with MLOps (CI/CD for ML, model versioning, monitoring). Proficiency in data engineering for AI: ETL, feature pipelines, data labeling, quality control. Knowledge of vector databases (e.g., Pinecone, FAISS, Weaviate) and retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) techniques. Cloud certifications from AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud Platform (GCP).

title: Research Fellow
description: The Lee Kong Chian School of Medicine (LKCMedicine) trains doctors who put patients at the centre of their exemplary care. The School, which offers both undergraduate and graduate programmes, is named after local philanthropist Tan Sri Dato Lee Kong Chian. Established in 2010 by Nanyang Technological University, Singapore, in partnership with Imperial College London, LKCMedicine aims to be a model for innovative medical education and a centre for transformative research. The School’s primary clinical partner is the National Healthcare Group, a leader in public healthcare recognised for the quality of its medical expertise, facilities and teaching. The School is transitioning to an NTU medical school ahead of the 2028 successful conclusion of the NTU-Imperial partnership to set up a Joint Medical School. In August 2024, we welcomed our first intake of the NTU MBBS programme, that has been recently enhanced to include themes like precision medicine and Artificial Intelligence (AI) in healthcare, with an expanded scope in the medical humanities. Graduates from the five-year undergraduate medical degree programme will have a strong understanding of the scientific basis of medicine, with an emphasis on technology, data science and the humanities. Asst Prof Sabrina Wong is Clinical Director or the Primary Care & Family Medicine group from LKCMedicine. She is also a Senior Consultant Family Physician and a Principal Clinician Scientist. She leads the Precision Digital Health lab, which was established to transform chronic disease management through advanced technology. The lab focuses on AI-driven, person-centered care, and it aims to harness generative AI and digital phenotyping to predict, prevent and personalise health interventions. We are looking for a Research Fellow with expertise in data science to advance research in digital health innovation. This role is integral to LKC’s mission of leveraging technology to transform healthcare and improve population health outcomes. Key Responsibilities: Design and implement advanced AI/ML models for healthcare applications, including predictive analytics and generative AI solutions. Develop and validate digital phenotyping algorithms using multimodal data (e.g., wearable sensors, EHRs, behavioral data) to detect early signs of chronic conditions such as cardiometabolic, mental health, and frailty-related disorders. Build generative AI systems to support personalized lifestyle interventions and clinical decision-making for chronic disease management. Perform large-scale data integration and analysis, ensuring data quality, security, and compliance with ethical standards. Collaborate with clinicians and behavioral scientists to translate computational models into actionable healthcare solutions. Publish high-impact research, contribute to grant proposals, and present findings at international conferences. Mentor junior researchers and interns, fostering a culture of innovation and excellence in data-driven healthcare research. Key Competencies and Requirements: PhD in Data Science, Computer Science, Biomedical Informatics or related field At least 3 years of relevant experience in data science or analytics role Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to translate complex data into actionable insights. Proficiency in data analysis tools and programming languages (e.g., SQL, Python, R) for data manipulation, analysis, and visualization. Familiarity with statistical techniques and data mining methods. Knowledge of database concepts and experience working with large datasets (good to have). Strong attention to detail and ability to handle and analyze data accurately. Excellent communication and presentation skills to effectively convey analytical findings to both technical and non-technical stakeholders. Ability to work independently and collaboratively in a fast-paced environment. We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

Familiarity with managing project tasks and assisting in client relations Skills and Competencies: Strong analytical and problem-solving skills. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to work effectively with clients and team members. Strong written communication skills, with the ability to produce clear and concise documentation and reports. Basic knowledge of project management software (e.g., Microsoft Project, Asana, Trello) is a plus. Basic knowledge of procurement processes and contract negotiation is desirable. Quick to learn and keep up with technology; savviness with e-payment technologies or relevant experience in automatic fare collection/account-based ticketing is an advantage. Additional Requirements: Strong organizational skills and the ability to prioritize tasks. Willingness to learn and adapt in a fast-paced environment. Familiarity with customer satisfaction measurement and feedback processes is a plus. Preferred Attributes: A proactive mindset with a focus on continuous improvement. Team player with a collaborative approach to problem-solving. Enthusiasm for professional development and growth in project management.

description: The Lee Kong Chian School of Medicine (LKCMedicine) trains doctors who put patients at the centre of their exemplary care. title: High School Design Technology Teacher
description: REPORTS TO: Middle & High School Principal JOB GOAL: A High School Design Technology teacher at ICS must have a strong understanding of the ISTE standards and have experience closing the achievement gap. This position is specifically for someone with a background in STEM, however other applicants will be considered. They must also develop engaging and innovative lessons that allow our students to grow academically, socially and emotionally. The teacher should be confident in incorporating technology (including emerging technologies such as GenAI) and hands-on learning experiences into the classroom with enthusiasm and also believe in collaboration with other colleagues, promoting understanding and communication in a diverse learning and cultural environment. PERFORMANCE RESPONSIBILITIES: Plan, prepare, and execute appropriate lessons, utilizing appropriate resource materials and activities. Follow the prescribed scope and sequence of curriculum and assessment as scheduled. Employ a variety of instructional aides, methods, and materials that will promote best practices in order to reach the whole child as stated in the ICS mission statement. Assess student learning against the appropriate standards on a regular basis and provide progress reports as required. Identify the needs of students through diagnostic procedures and align instructional objectives to these needs. Effect student learning through mastery of the subject material by utilizing valid teaching techniques to achieve curriculum goals within the framework of the school’s philosophy. Eager to explore and learn about emerging technologies, such as Generative AI, with a commitment to integrating them effectively into the classroom to foster critical thinking and guide students in developing ethical and responsible use. Ensure Biblical Worldwide Integration (BWI) is mapped throughout the curriculum. Complete lesson/unit plans, Atlas, ESO documentation, and PLC expectations within specified time frames. Maintain student records as required by the school. Communicate with parents, students, and other professional staff regarding student progress (behavioral and academic). Follow school policies, procedures, rules, regulations, and guidelines and the provisions of the contract. Maintain proper discipline in the classroom and on the school premises utilizing teacher created discipline plans in conjunction with a school-wide discipline plan. Inform the administration if/when unable to fulfill any duty assigned. Prepare adequate information and materials for a substitute teacher. Plan and lead a student Chapel when called upon. Supervise extracurricular activities, organizations, and outings as assigned. Complete the Christian Philosophy of Education in-service program within the first three years of teaching at ICS. Attend and participate in devotions, teachers’ meetings, evening programs (if involving his or her students or as requested by the administration), and other meetings as assigned. Carry out supervisory duty as assigned (before school, break, lunch, after school). Maintain a classroom in a clean and educationally stimulating environment. Maintain regular and accurate attendance and grade reports that provide comprehensive information for each student’s learning progress. Keep students, parents, and the administration informed of students’ progress or deficiencies, and provide sufficient and timely notice to parents when students fail to meet learning standards. Submit all appropriate reports to the administration, guidance office, and business office as required by school regulations or as requested. Work with the administration in implementing all policies, procedures, and directives governing the operation of the school. Complete professional development programs as required by the administration and/or ICS Board. Maintain teaching credentials as required through sponsoring agencies (state/provincial education department, ACSI, etc.). Acquire and maintain teaching credentials as required by the laws of Singapore, NICS, and/or ICS. Demonstrate the character qualities of enthusiasm, courtesy, flexibility, integrity, kindness, self-control, perseverance, and punctuality. Exemplify strong interpersonal and communication skills. Meet everyday stress with emotional stability, objectivity, and optimism. Develop and maintain rapport with students, parents, and staff by treating others with friendliness, open-mindedness, dignity, and consideration. Respectfully submit to and demonstrate loyalty to constituted authority. Maintain a personal appearance that models cleanliness, modesty, good taste, and is in agreement with school policy. QUALIFICATIONS: Bachelor’s Degree Teaching credential from a US state, Canadian province or from ACSI (exceptions will be approved by the Academic Board) Experience working with students Knowledge and experience teaching STEM is preferred.

title: Solutions Engineer
description: Grafana Labs is a remote-first, open-source powerhouse. There are more than 20M users of Grafana, the open source visualization tool, around the globe, monitoring everything from beehives to climate change in the Alps. The instantly recognizable dashboards have been spotted everywhere from a NASA launch and Minecraft HQ to Wimbledon and the Tour de France. Grafana Labs also helps more than 3,000 companies -- including Bloomberg, JPMorgan Chase, and eBay -- manage their observability strategies with the Grafana LGTM Stack, which can be run fully managed with Grafana Cloud or self-managed with the Grafana Enterprise Stack, both featuring scalable metrics (Grafana Mimir), logs (Grafana Loki), and traces (Grafana Tempo). We’re scaling fast and staying true to what makes us different: an open-source legacy, a global collaborative culture, and a passion for meaningful work. Our team thrives in an innovation-driven environment where transparency, autonomy, and trust fuel everything we do. You may not meet every requirement, and that’s okay. If this role excites you, we’d love you to raise your hand for what could be a truly career-defining opportunity. The Opportunity Our Commercial Solutions Engineering team are our in-house, customer-facing product experts. The Commercial SE team enables Grafana Labs worldwide growth by educating potential and existing customers to ensure they are happy and successful. We share our technical and product expertise with customers through demos, hands-on enablement, presentations, technical evaluations and ongoing interaction. We also partner closely with our Sales team to help qualify and close opportunities. The Commercial SE team is also one of the primary routes of communication from our customers through into the Product Management and Engineering teams. What You'll Be Doing Joining a high growth team working together to solve technical and customer problems the right way Partner with our Sales team to articulate the overall Grafana value proposition, vision, and strategy to customers Own the technical engagement with customers and help to close high-velocity opportunities through advanced competitive knowledge, technical skill, and credibility Deliver product and technical presentations to potential and existing customers Proactively communicate with customers and internal teams to provide a feedback loop on our products and the competitive landscape Drive product conversations based on need and problems learned during customer interactions Work with the team to enhance documentation, write blog posts, record videos, contribute knowledge base articles, and create other public and internal enablement material What Makes You a Great Fit We are not necessarily looking for people with previous solutions/sales engineering experience! We are building a team with diverse experiences and backgrounds so if you are up for a challenge and looking to make a pivot in your career, we’d love to hear from you! description:

This role is instrumental in supporting Chevron’s global trading operations by analysing market fundamentals, trade flows, competitor activity, and industry trends. The successful candidate will contribute to value creation by delivering actionable insights and supporting strategic trading decisions. Responsibilities for this position may include but are not limited to: Monitor and evaluate market fundamentals, pricing structures, global trade flows, and competitor production profiles and other industry information to generate insights that support trading strategies. Lead and facilitate discussions on fundamentals with a broader team of traders and other analysts, providing timely key market data and relevant analysis to help the Trading team to formulate view of market directions and inform new trade ideas on physical and financial trading. Collaborate with Commercial Analysts and Traders across Houston, Singapore, London and Middle East to support global arbitrage, supply/demand modelling and commercial opportunity identification. Develop and apply models/tools to monitor and forecast key market drivers such as infrastructure, supply/demand, and industry production to support trading strategies. Identify and recommend trading opportunities using deterministic analytical models and dynamic analytical models, as well as apply quantitative risk management methodologies to guide trading teams in informed decision-making. Model deal economics/ analysis to identify feasible alternatives with trade-offs. Pilot and leverage advanced digital tools-including machine learning and predictive analytics-to enhance trading performance and uncover new market opportunities. Conduct performance lookbacks on trading outcomes and assess the accuracy of market calls and price forecasts. Build and maintain a network of industry contacts to enhance market intelligence, generate insights and conduct economic analysis for future opportunities. Champion process improvements by partnering with internal teams to optimize digital tools and pursue analytical process improvement opportunities to reduce manual effort. Required Qualifications: Bachelor's degree with a minimum of 3 years of experience in Oil & Gas Industry, trading, market data analytics, or related roles. Solid understanding of commodity markets, including crude, natural gas, renewables, and/or refined products. Experience analysing commodity market fundamentals, with a preference for that to have been in NGL and Petrochemical, LNG, gas or power markets would be advantageous. Strong analytical, problem-solving, and organizational skills. Demonstrated ability to manipulate and analyse data sets and use economic models to test sensitivities and identify key value drivers all with minimal direction. Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Power BI, and PowerPoint; experience with Python for data analysis and visualization is preferred. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with the ability to present market insights clearly and concisely to influence and achieve optimum decisions. A collaborative team player who thrives in a fast-paced environment and ability to work effectively in a cross-functional team environment. A digital-first mindset with a passion for innovation, ability to utilize decision analysis tools and processes to evaluate multiple commercial options and drive continuous improvement.

title: Principal Software Test Engineer (Lifecycle Management)
description: Job Description Bring more to life. Are you ready to accelerate your potential and make a real difference within life sciences, diagnostics and biotechnology? At Leica Microsystems, one of Danaher’s 15+ operating companies, our work saves lives—and we’re all united by a shared commitment to innovate for tangible impact. You’ll thrive in a culture of belonging where you and your unique viewpoint matter. And by harnessing Danaher’s system of continuous improvement, you help turn ideas into impact – innovating at the speed of life. Shape the Future with Us! At Leica Microsystems, we have been shaping the future for over 175 years with groundbreaking optical and digital solutions.  With a culture rooted in customer focus, innovation, and teamwork, we lead the market in microscopy, imaging, and analysis, unveiling the invisible and empowering our customers to build a better, healthier world. Joining Leica Microsystems means contributing to scientific discoveries and supporting surgeons in making critical decisions. Our advanced microscopes and AI-based image analysis solutions enable users to gain profound insights into development and engineering challenges. Here, you will work on meaningful projects alongside passionate colleagues, driving progress and pushing the boundaries of what’s possible. Learn about the Danaher Business System which makes everything possible. The Principal Software Test Engineer Life Cycle Management is responsible for developing, coordinating, and implementing software testing policies and procedures, as well as performing system-level verification. This role provides feedback and recommendations to support continuous improvement in software quality. The position requires independent work, a results-driven approach, and offers technical guidance to team members. This position reports to the Senior Manager Design Transfer & Life Cycle Management and is part of the Research & Development Medical located in Singapore and will be an on-site role. In this role, you will have the opportunity to: Collaborate with development teams to ensure products meet and exceed end-user expectations. Design, develop, and maintain test scripts for system and user acceptance testing based on product requirements. Execute tests and manage test coverage, including creating test data, producing logs, and reporting issues. Lead troubleshooting and root cause analysis to resolve software-related problems effectively. Drive automation testing initiatives using tools like SpecFlow and programming languages such as C# for efficient processes. The essential requirements of the job include Bachelor’s or Master’s degree in Engineering or Science, with strong knowledge of software verification methods, at least one high-level programming language, and familiarity with automated testing tools. 5 years’ experience in device/embedded software testing, including end-to-end applications interacting with hardware. Proficiency in software development and test methodologies, preferably Agile/Scrum. Experience with medical device quality standards such as IEC 62304, ISO 13485, and ISO 14971, and exposure to cybersecurity domain. Proven ability to collaborate effectively with global teams and stakeholders in a distributed model. Leica Microsystems, a Danaher operating company, offers a broad array of comprehensive, competitive benefit programs that add value to our lives. Whether it’s a health care program or paid time off, our programs contribute to life beyond the job. Check out our benefits at Danaher Benefits Info .

title: Research Fellow (Asphalt Pavement Materials and Modelling)
description:
Interested applicants are invited to apply directly at the NUS
Career Portal Your application will be processed only if you apply
via NUS
Career Portal We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified. Job Description The National University of Singapore (NUS) Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering invites applications for one (1) Research Fellow position in the area of resilient asphalt pavement materials and modelling with focus on new materials, modelling and design. The candidate is expected to work in research projects related to the topic funded by the National Research Foundation of Singapore and Land Transport Authority of Singapore, and the Defence Science and Technology Agency of Singapore. The candidate will be working with Associate Professor Ong Ghim Ping Raymond from the Department of Civil and Environmental Engineering, College of Design and Engineering (CDE)( https://cde.nus.edu.sg/cee/staff/ong-ghim-ping-raymond/) in fundamental and translational research in the development of new asphalt pavement design guidelines. The selected individual is required to: •    Perform laboratory and field experiments on asphalt pavements functional and environmental performance as core focus. •    Work on mechanistic empirical pavement design and balanced mix design standard development. •    Model pavement behaviours using analytical and numerical methods with the end goal in modification of mechanistic empirical pavement design and balanced mix design to suit local context. •    Develop state of the art solutions for high performance pavement system and work closely with contractors and agencies on field construction implementation to ensure solution is commercially viable. •    Manage research project progress, grant administration, and finance. •    Work on other relevant tasks set out by the project PI. The candidate should also possess good communication and team working skills and has the ability to present research findings in publications and professional meetings (including with agencies and the industry). To apply, please furnish the following documents: •    Cover letter •    Curriculum vitae and transcripts, including a list of publications (provide softcopies of relevant papers) •    Four referee letters (of which one must be from the PhD supervisor) Only shortlisted candidates will be notified Job Requirements •    Possess a PhD in civil engineering or a related area. •    Applicants with relevant experience in both experimental and field asphalt pavement design, standard development and construction would be favourably considered. •    Candidates without experience are welcome to apply. •    Strong written and spoken communications. •    Open to fixed-term contract. •    Only shortlisted candidates will be notified
